name: Fighter
description: A stalwart tank who trades finesse for staying power — high health and defense, shield and sword. Built to hold the line while others fall.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: A heavy shield strike that staggers the target.

abilities.name: Whirlwind Slash
abilities.description: A spinning sword attack that strikes 3 times in rapid succession.

abilities.name: Shield Fortify
abilities.description: Brace behind your shield. +5 defense for 3 turns.
